project.name: PropManager Tenant Payment Workflow
project.description: End-to-end tenant payment workflow from onboarding through move-out. Fixes broken payment button, implements M-Pesa split payments via IntaSend, enhances configurable KYC, standardizes move-out deductions, and adds real-time dashboard updates.

qualityStandards.description: The payment workflow is the core revenue path for both landlords and platform. Reliability, security, and real-time feedback are non-negotiable.
principles: Write failing test FIRST (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR) for all payment operations
Every payment must be idempotent - duplicate webhooks must not create duplicate payments
Platform fees tracked for 100% of digital payments
Real-time status updates reduce support burden
KYC and payment gates prevent lease activation without compliance
Move-out deductions must be auditable with photo evidence support
Use FormRequest for all validation (StorePaymentRequest, etc.)
Use Policy for authorization (PaymentPolicy, InvoicePolicy, KycPolicy)
All new models must have Factories for testing

feedbackLoops.description: Run ALL feedback loops before committing. Do NOT commit if any fail.

before_commit: No new inline validation in controllers

workflow.description: Standard workflow for implementing each PRD item

steps.name: Write Failing Test
steps.description: Before writing any implementation code, create test(s) that verify the acceptance criteria. Payment operations require extensive edge case coverage.
steps.example: test('webhook creates payment idempotently', function() { ... expectation that fails ... })

steps.name: Minimal Implementation
steps.description: Write the minimum code to make the test pass. Do not optimize prematurely.

steps.name: Refactor
steps.description: Clean up the implementation while keeping tests green.

steps.name: Verify
steps.description: Run full test suite and quality checks before marking item complete.

items.title: Fix Tenant Dashboard Pay Now Button
items.description: The Pay Now button on Tenant Dashboard links to route('tenant.payments') which renders an incomplete/legacy page (TenantPortalController@payments). Should link to tenant.finances.index which renders TenantFinances/Index.vue with the working payment flow.
steps: Open resources/js/Pages/Tenant/Dashboard.vue
Find all occurrences of route('tenant.payments') - lines 123, 263, 281, 291, 342, 401
Replace with route('tenant.finances.index')
Verify no other files reference tenant.payments route
Consider removing the legacy route from routes/web.php
definition_of_ready: Broken route confirmed via manual testing
acceptance_criteria: All Pay Now buttons navigate to TenantFinances/Index page
No 404 or blank page errors
Payment flow works end-to-end from tenant dashboard
definition_of_done: Manual test: login as tenant, click Pay Now, lands on finances page
items.verification: Login as tenant with pending invoice, click Pay Now button, verify navigation to TenantFinances/Index.vue page.

items.title: Create KYC Requirements Database Schema
items.description: Create tables for configurable KYC requirements per building and track tenant submissions with review workflow. Currently KYC is hardcoded (selfie, national_id). Landlords need to configure required documents per building.
steps: Create migration 2026_01_22_000001_create_kyc_requirements_tables.php
Create kyc_requirements table with id, building_id (nullable FK), requirement_type, label, description, is_required, is_active, sort_order, timestamps
Create tenant_kyc_submissions table with id, user_id FK, requirement_id FK, document_id FK, status enum, rejection_reason, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, timestamps
Run migration
Create seeder for default KYC requirements (selfie, national_id, signed_lease)
definition_of_ready: Schema design accounts for building-level and global defaults
acceptance_criteria: Tables created with proper indexes and foreign keys
Default requirements seeded (selfie, national_id, signed_lease with is_required=true)
Migration runs without errors on fresh and existing databases
Rollback works cleanly
definition_of_done: Tables visible in database with correct structure
items.verification: php artisan migrate:fresh --seed completes successfully; query tables to verify structure and seeded data.

items.title: Create KYC Models and Relationships
items.description: Create Eloquent models for KycRequirement and TenantKycSubmission with proper relationships, scopes, and helper methods.
steps: Create app/Models/KycRequirement.php with belongsTo(Building), scopes: active(), required(), forBuilding($buildingId), global()
Create app/Models/TenantKycSubmission.php with belongsTo(User), belongsTo(KycRequirement), belongsTo(Document), scopes: pending(), approved(), rejected()
Add kycSubmissions() relationship to User model
Add kycRequirements() relationship to Building model
Add hasCompletedKyc() method to User (checks all required submissions approved)
definition_of_ready: Existing User model reviewed for conflicts
acceptance_criteria: Models have proper fillable, casts, and relationships
Scopes work for filtering active/required requirements
Can query building-specific requirements with fallback to global
hasCompletedKyc() returns correct boolean
items.verification: php artisan tinker: Create requirement, create submission, test relationships and scopes.

items.title: Update KYC Controller for Dynamic Requirements
items.description: Refactor TenantKycController to use dynamic requirements instead of fixed fields. The controller should fetch requirements based on tenant's building and track submissions with review workflow.
steps: Update TenantKycController@show to fetch requirements for tenant's lease building with global fallback
Update TenantKycController@update to accept uploads keyed by requirement_id, create Document and TenantKycSubmission records
Create TenantKycController@review for landlord to approve/reject submissions
Update EnsureTenantKycComplete middleware to check all required requirements have approved submissions
acceptance_criteria: KYC page shows dynamic requirements based on tenant's building
Documents uploaded and linked to requirements correctly
Middleware blocks access until all required KYC approved
Landlord can review (approve/reject) submissions
definition_of_done: Manual test: new tenant sees correct requirements, uploads work
items.verification: Complete KYC flow as new tenant, verify submissions created; as landlord, approve submissions, verify tenant can access lease.

items.title: Update CompleteKyc.vue for Dynamic Requirements
items.description: Update frontend KYC page to render dynamic form based on building requirements. Show upload status for each requirement with rejection handling.
steps: Update props to receive requirements array and submissions from controller
Create dynamic form iterating over requirements with label, description, required badge
Show upload input (if no submission or rejected), status badge, rejection reason
Update progress indicator to show completion percentage
Handle resubmission for rejected documents
Disable submit until all required documents uploaded
acceptance_criteria: Form displays all required and optional requirements
Upload works for each document type
Progress shows accurate completion percentage
Rejected documents show reason and allow resubmission
Submit button disabled until all required docs uploaded
items.verification: As tenant, navigate to KYC page, verify dynamic form renders, upload documents, verify submission states update.

items.title: Create IntaSend Configuration
items.description: Add IntaSend configuration file and environment variables for M-Pesa split payments. IntaSend allows STK Push with simultaneous splits to platform and landlord wallets.
steps: Create config/intasend.php with api_key, secret_key, environment, webhook_secret, platform_wallet_id, endpoints
Add INTASEND_* variables to .env.example
Document in CLAUDE.md
acceptance_criteria: Config file loads correctly via config('intasend.*')
Sandbox and live endpoints configurable via environment
All required credentials have env placeholders
definition_of_done: Tinker test: config('intasend.endpoints.sandbox') returns correct URL
items.verification: php artisan tinker: config('intasend') returns expected array structure.

items.title: Create IntaSendService
items.description: Create service class for IntaSend M-Pesa API integration with split payment support. Reference PaystackService for pattern.
steps: Create app/Services/IntaSendService.php
Implement initializeMpesaStkPush(amount, phone, reference, splitConfig) for STK Push with split
Implement verifyTransaction(checkoutId) for status checks
Implement validateWebhookSignature(payload, signature) for HMAC verification
Implement formatPhoneNumber(phone) to normalize to 254 format
Create typed exceptions: IntaSendException, IntaSendValidationException
definition_of_ready: IntaSend API docs reviewed (STK Push, webhooks)
acceptance_criteria: STK push initiates correctly in sandbox
Split configuration sends correct percentages
Phone number formatting handles all Kenya formats (07xx, 01xx, 254xx)
Webhook signature validation works
All exceptions typed and logged
definition_of_done: Manual sandbox test: STK push received on phone
items.verification: Unit test phone formatting; sandbox test: initiate STK push, verify phone receives prompt.

items.title: Create IntaSend Transaction Tracking
items.description: Create database table and model for tracking IntaSend transactions. Add columns to payments table for IntaSend references.
steps: Create migration 2026_01_22_000002_create_intasend_transactions_table.php with payment_id, invoice_id, intasend_reference, checkout_id, phone_number, amount, platform_fee, landlord_amount, status, mpesa_receipt, failure_reason, webhook_payload
Create migration to add intasend_reference to payments table
Create app/Models/IntaSendTransaction.php model with relationships
acceptance_criteria: Tables created with proper indexes
Model relationships work correctly
Can track full transaction lifecycle (pending -> processing -> completed/failed)
Platform fee and landlord amount tracked separately
items.verification: php artisan migrate; Tinker: create transaction, verify relationships.

items.title: Create IntaSend Webhook Controller
items.description: Create webhook handler for IntaSend M-Pesa callbacks with idempotency, payment creation, and real-time events.
steps: Create app/Http/Controllers/Api/IntaSendWebhookController.php
Implement handleMpesa() with signature validation, pessimistic locking, payment creation, invoice update, event dispatch
Add route: POST /webhooks/intasend/mpesa
Exclude from CSRF verification
Add IP whitelist middleware if IntaSend provides
acceptance_criteria: Webhook validates signature correctly
Idempotency prevents duplicate payments
Payment and PlatformFee records created correctly
Invoice status updated (partial or paid)
Event dispatched for real-time updates
definition_of_done: Manual test with IntaSend sandbox webhook
items.verification: Sandbox test: complete STK push, verify webhook received, payment created, invoice updated.

items.title: Create IntaSendPaymentStatusChanged Event
items.description: Create broadcasting event for real-time M-Pesa STK push status updates. Frontend subscribes to show pending/processing/success/failed states.
steps: Create app/Events/IntaSendPaymentStatusChanged.php
Implement ShouldBroadcast interface
Broadcast to private channel: intasend.{checkoutId}
Payload: status, message, mpesa_receipt (if success), failure_reason (if failed)
Add channel auth in routes/channels.php
acceptance_criteria: Event broadcasts to correct private channel
Channel authorization works (user owns the transaction)
Status updates include all relevant data
Frontend can subscribe and receive updates
definition_of_done: Manual test: dispatch event, verify received in browser console
items.verification: Browser test: subscribe to channel, dispatch test event, verify received.

items.title: Update TenantFinances/Pay.vue for IntaSend
items.description: Add IntaSend M-Pesa as payment option in tenant payment page. Show real-time STK push status feedback.
steps: Add intasend_mpesa to payment method options (when landlord has it configured)
Add phone number input for IntaSend M-Pesa
Create initiateIntaSendPayment() function: POST to /api/v1/tenant/payments/intasend/initiate, subscribe to status channel
Add status feedback UI: sending, waiting for PIN, processing, success/failed
Handle timeout (60 seconds)
acceptance_criteria: IntaSend option appears when landlord has it configured
Phone number validated (Kenyan format)
Real-time status updates shown during payment
Success navigates back to finances page
Failure shows clear error message
definition_of_done: Manual sandbox test: full payment flow
items.verification: As tenant, select IntaSend M-Pesa, enter phone, verify STK push received, complete payment, verify success shown.

items.title: Create Move-Out Deduction Categories Schema
items.description: Create standardized deduction categories with building defaults. Based on Kenya rental practices: paint works, cleaning, key replacement, repairs, etc.
steps: Create migration 2026_01_22_000004_create_move_out_deduction_categories.php with building_id, name, description, default_amount, always_apply, is_active, sort_order
Add category_id FK to move_out_deductions table
Create seeder with common categories: Paint Works (5,000 KES), Cleaning Fee (3,000), Key Replacement (500), repairs, etc.
acceptance_criteria: Categories table created with building relationship
Deductions can reference categories
Common categories seeded with appropriate defaults
always_apply flag works for auto-adding
items.verification: php artisan migrate:fresh --seed; query categories table; create deduction with category.

items.title: Implement Building Default Deductions
items.description: Allow landlords to configure default deductions per building that auto-apply when inspection starts. Defaults can be removed/adjusted during inspection.
steps: Add building_deduction_defaults JSON column to buildings table (or create pivot table)
Update MoveOutController@startInspection to auto-create deductions for building's always_apply categories
Create UI in Buildings/Edit.vue for configuring default deductions
Allow landlord to remove auto-applied deductions during inspection
acceptance_criteria: Landlord can set default deductions per building
Defaults auto-apply when inspection starts
Auto-applied deductions clearly marked
Landlord can modify/remove auto-applied during inspection
definition_of_done: Manual test: configure defaults, start inspection, verify auto-applied
items.verification: Configure building with 2 default deductions; start move-out inspection; verify both auto-added.

items.title: Update MoveOuts/Show.vue for Categories
items.description: Update move-out inspection UI to use deduction categories. Show category dropdown, default amounts, and distinguish auto vs manual deductions.
steps: Add category dropdown when adding new deduction
Auto-fill default amount when category selected
Show category name in deduction list
Badge for auto-applied vs manually added
Update deduction form to include category_id
acceptance_criteria: Category dropdown shows available options
Default amount auto-fills when category selected
Clear distinction between auto and manual deductions
Category name shown in deduction list
items.verification: During inspection, add deduction via category, verify amount prefills, verify displays correctly.

items.title: Enhance PaymentReceived Event with Split Details
items.description: Add split payment details to PaymentReceived broadcast so landlord dashboard shows net amount after platform fee.
steps: Update app/Events/PaymentReceived.php broadcastWith() to add platform_fee, landlord_amount, split_provider
Update landlord dashboard to show net amount in real-time updates
Update metrics calculation to use landlord_amount
acceptance_criteria: Split details included in broadcast payload
Landlord sees net amount (after platform fee)
Dashboard metrics show correct revenue figures
definition_of_done: Manual test: make payment, verify split details in broadcast
items.verification: Make payment via Paystack/IntaSend; verify landlord dashboard updates with correct net amount.

items.title: Create Expired Invitation Cleanup Command
items.description: Create scheduled command to cleanup expired tenant invitations and delete associated unverified user accounts (users who registered but never completed KYC or payment verification).
steps: Create app/Console/Commands/CleanupExpiredInvitations.php
Find TenantInvitation where status='pending' AND expires_at < now() - 30 days
For each, check if user has NOT completed KYC and has NO verified payments
If both conditions true, soft-delete the user and mark invitation as expired
Add Schedule::command('invitations:cleanup')->daily() in routes/console.php (Laravel 11+ scheduling)
definition_of_ready: Soft delete vs hard delete decision made
acceptance_criteria: Command identifies correct expired invitations (30+ days past expiry)
Only deletes users who haven't completed KYC or payment
Does NOT delete users who are active tenants
Logs all actions for audit
items.verification: Create test expired invitation with unverified user; run command; verify user soft-deleted, invitation marked expired.

items.title: Create KYC Settings Page for Landlords
items.description: Allow landlords to configure KYC requirements per building. Can add custom requirements beyond the defaults (selfie, ID, signed lease).
steps: Create resources/js/Pages/Settings/KycRequirements.vue
Add route and controller method
List all KYC requirements (global defaults + building-specific)
Toggle required/optional for each requirement
Add new requirements for specific buildings
Reorder requirements (sort_order)
Add navigation link in Settings or Building edit
acceptance_criteria: Landlord can view all KYC requirements
Can add building-specific requirements
Can toggle required/optional
Changes immediately reflect in tenant KYC flow
definition_of_done: Manual test: add requirement, verify tenant sees it
items.verification: As landlord, add custom requirement for building; as tenant of that building, verify new requirement shown in KYC form.

executionOrder: PAY-001 - Fix broken Pay Now button (CRITICAL, no dependencies)
PAY-009 - IntaSend webhook controller (depends: PAY-007, PAY-008)
PAY-011 - Update Pay.vue for IntaSend (depends: PAY-009, PAY-010)
PAY-017 - KYC settings page for landlords (depends: PAY-004)

metrics: Tenant Dashboard 'Pay Now' navigates to TenantFinances/Index
KYC requirements are configurable per building
Signed lease agreement can be uploaded during KYC
IntaSend M-Pesa payments split correctly (platform + landlord)
Platform fees tracked for all IntaSend payments
Real-time STK push status shown to tenant
Landlord dashboard updates in real-time when tenant pays
Move-out deduction categories display and can be selected
Building default deductions auto-apply on inspection start
Expired invitations cleaned up after 30 days
Unverified tenant accounts deleted with expired invitations
